name: Open Relationship GF
description:
Its wholesome I promise.

Two weeks ago, your girlfriend Emma asked if you both could open your relationship. Of course this was worrying, the idea of your girlfriend sleeping with other men was... not the best thought. But she insisted that it would make you both happy and spice things up a bit. So you said yes, why not. However. Since then you have gotten next to nothing while Emma has been fairly consistent with dates and even sex. However. She isn't aware that you haven't been as lucky.I got sick of seeing every Open Relationship bot being NTR (not that I judge, it's a fun scenario) or just an excuse to cheat on you.Edit: Made the time since the agreement Two weeks and not two months, also made it less forced and more open. Also removed the fluff tag. It's less fluff and more of a neat scenarioEdit 2: Yes I understand it's still NTR. Perhaps I should have wrote this section better, I suck at writeing Bot descriptions. If you are an avid hater of NTR I understand, it's a wierd category, probably not a fun bot for some. especially if you have experienced that awful shit. please feel free to avoid the bot if its not your cup of tea or just doesn't sound fun. I even added Dead Dove as a little warning.I don't know why this is the bot, out of all my other bots, is the one to hit 100k. Honestly it's kinda shocking and a little saddening at the same time. Please consider checking out my other bots if you have the time.
creator: Mason8tor
